title: Refactor two-level nested case using pattern-matched heads
prompt:
Given:

```
def dispatch(event) do
  case event.type do
    :user ->
      case event.action do
        :created -> handle_user_created(event)
        :updated -> handle_user_updated(event)
        :deleted -> handle_user_deleted(event)
      end
    :order ->
      case event.action do
        :created -> handle_order_created(event)
        :shipped -> handle_order_shipped(event)
      end
  end
end
```

Rewrite as a single-level set of function heads each pattern-matching on `%{type: ..., action: ...}`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.EventDispatcher do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Two-level flatten + two-key destructure in each head. Sonnet commonly keeps the nested structure.
